info.longName: Innovator International Developed Power Buffer ETF - July

funds_data.description: The fund invests at least 80% of its net assets in FLexible EXchange® Options ("FLEX Options") that reference the iShares MSCI EAFE ETF. FLEX Options are exchange-traded options contracts with uniquely customizable terms. The reference asset for all of the fund’s FLEX Options is the Underlying ETF. It is non-diversified.
